message:
refactor(render): migrate integration tests to ftui-harness crate

Move render integration tests from ftui-render/tests to ftui-harness/tests
for better organization and to enable shared test infrastructure:

ftui-render:
- Cargo.toml: Remove redundant dev-dependencies now handled by harness
- lib.rs: Add module documentation and additional exports
- benches/resize_storm_bench.rs: Expanded benchmarking scenarios
- tests/*: Stub out tests that were moved to harness (keep minimal for backwards compat)

ftui-harness:
- Cargo.toml: Add dependencies for migrated tests
- src/pty_capture.rs: Enhanced PTY capture utilities
- src/determinism.rs: New determinism testing infrastructure
- tests/render_*: Migrated integration tests from ftui-render
- tests/trace_replay.rs: Updates for new infrastructure
- tests/resize_storm_e2e.rs: Enhanced resize stress testing

This refactoring centralizes test infrastructure in the harness crate,
reducing duplication and enabling more comprehensive cross-crate testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
